## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor or maintenance
- [ ] Test-only change

## Verification

List the commands or manual checks you ran:

## Reviewer notes

Call out anything reviewers should pay special attention to, including migration impact, risk, screenshots, or follow-up work.

## Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed my own diff before requesting review.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behaviour changes.
- [ ] I updated documentation for user-facing or contributor-facing changes.
- [ ] I rebuilt generated JavaScript `dist/` output when package source changed.
- [ ] I refreshed all JavaScript lockfiles when dependencies changed.
- [ ] I considered Vite and Webpack behaviour where relevant.
- [ ] I considered sandbox coverage where relevant.
